---
title: "Other"
toc: true
toc-location: right
toc-title: " "
---

A collection of professional activities, affiliations, and links that don't fit neatly on the other pages.

## Conferences

- **[FSU Risk Management and Insurance Research Symposium](https://business.fsu.edu/rmiresearchsymposium)**, hosted by the [FSU Risk Management and Insurance Center](https://insurancecenter.business.fsu.edu/).

## Selected Invited Talks

- February 2025 — University of Georgia, Athens, GA. *Homeowners Insurance and Housing Prices*.
- November 2023 — University of North Texas, Denton, TX. *Regulatory Capital and Catastrophe Risk*.
- January 2022 — Egyptian Online Seminar in Business Accounting and Economics (Virtual). *The Capital Market Consequences Associated with Classifying Unrealized Gains and Losses on AFS Equity Securities in GAAP Net Income*.
- November 2019 — Wilfrid Laurier University, Waterloo, Canada. *Accounting Discretion and Loss Reserve Discounting: Evidence from the Canadian Property-Casualty Insurance Industry*.
- September 2018 — Temple University, Philadelphia, PA. *Accounting Discretion and Regulation: Evidence from Health Insurers and the Affordable Care Act*.

## Service & Editorial

- **Associate Editor**, [*Risk Management and Insurance Review*](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/15406296) (2025–present).
- **Chair**, ARIA Kulp-Wright Book Award Committee (2026); committee member (2020, 2023, 2025).
- **Secretary**, [Southern Risk and Insurance Association](https://southernrisk.org/) (2025–2026); board member (2019–2021, 2024–2025).
- Member, ARIA Program Committee (2020, 2023–2026); ARIA Nomination Committee (2022); ARIA Hagen Family Foundation Travel Award Committee (2018, 2020).

Ad-hoc reviewer for *Accounting Forum*, *Applied Economics*, *Geneva Papers on Risk and Insurance—Issues and Practice*, *Journal of Contingencies and Crisis Management*, *Journal of Financial Research*, *Journal of Insurance Issues*, *Journal of Insurance Regulation*, *Journal of Risk and Insurance*, *North American Actuarial Journal*, *Risk Management and Insurance Review*, *Risks*, and *The Financial Review*.
